targets.query:
from(bucket: "transformer")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "transformer_001")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "顶层油温")

from(bucket: "transformer")
  |> range(start: -1m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "transformer_001")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "绕组温度")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "transformer")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "transformer_001")
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
      r._field == "H2" or
      r._field == "CH4" or
      r._field == "C2H2" or
      r._field == "CO" or
      r._field == "C2H4")

from(bucket: "transformer")
  |> range(start: -1m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "transformer_001")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "微水含量")
  |> last()

panels.title: IEC 三比值法故障诊断

targets.query:
// IEC 三比值法面板 — InfluxDB Flux 查询
// 拉取最新一条数据中的 5 种气体浓度

import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"

from(bucket: "transformer")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "transformer_001")
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
      r["_field"] == "H2"   or
      r["_field"] == "CH4"  or
      r["_field"] == "C2H2" or
      r["_field"] == "C2H4" or
      r["_field"] == "C2H6"
  )
  |> last()
  |> schema.fieldsAsCols()
